/bin/zsh -c "rg -n \"from sympy.core.* import .*I|from sympy import .*sqrt|from sympy.functions.elementary.miscellaneous import sqrt\" sympy/functions/special/*.py | head -20; ./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import *
phi=(1+sqrt(5))/2
vals=[(sqrt(5)-1)/2,-(sqrt(5)-1)/2,-(sqrt(5)+1)/2,(3-sqrt(5))/2]
forms=[pi**2/10-log(phi)**2,-pi**2/15+log(phi)**2/2,-pi**2/10-log(phi)**2,pi**2/15-log(phi)**2]
for z,f in zip(vals,forms): print(N(polylog(2,z,evaluate=False)-f,20))
PY"

             return 0
+        elif s == 2:
+            if z == S.Half:
+                return pi**2/12 - log(2)**2/2
+            elif z == 2:
+                return pi**2/4 - I*pi*log(2)
+
+            golden_ratio = (1 + sqrt(5))/2
+            if z == 1/golden_ratio:
+                return pi**2/10 - log(golden_ratio)**2
+            elif z == -1/golden_ratio:
+                return -pi**2/15 + log(golden_ratio)**2/2
+            elif z == -golden_ratio:
+                return -pi**2/10 - log(golden_ratio)**2
+            elif z == 1/golden_ratio**2:
+                return pi**2/15 - log(golden_ratio)**2

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import I, Rational, expand_func, log, pi, polylog, symbols
z = symbols('z')
assert polylog(2, Rational(1, 2)) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12
assert expand_func(polylog(2, Rational(1, 2))) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12
assert expand_func(polylog(1, z)) == -log(1 - z)
assert expand_func((polylog(1, z) + log(1 - z)).diff(z)).simplify() == 0
assert polylog(2, 2) == pi**2/4 - I*pi*log(2)
print('polylog identities verified')
PY
./.venv/bin/python bin/test -C --verbose sympy/functions/special/tests/test_zeta_functions.py -k test_polylog_values"

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import I, Rational, expand_func, log, pi, polylog, symbols
z = symbols('z')
assert polylog(2, Rational(1, 2)) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12
assert expand_func(polylog(2, Rational(1, 2))) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12
assert expand_func(polylog(1, z)) == -log(1 - z)
assert expand_func((polylog(1, z) + log(1 - z)).diff(z)).simplify() == 0
assert polylog(2, 2) == pi**2/4 - I*pi*log(2)
print('polylog identities verified')
PY
./.venv/bin/python bin/test -C --verbose sympy/functions/special/tests/test_zeta_functions.py -k test_polylog_values"

from sympy import I, Rational, expand_func, log, pi, polylog, symbols
z = symbols('z')
assert polylog(2, Rational(1, 2)) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12

assert expand_func(polylog(1, z)) == -log(1 - z)
assert expand_func((polylog(1, z) + log(1 - z)).diff(z)).simplify() == 0
assert polylog(2, 2) == pi**2/4 - I*pi*log(2)
print('polylog identities verified')
PY
./.venv/bin/python bin/test -C --verbose sympy/functions/special/tests/test_zeta_functions.py -k test_polylog_values"

/bin/zsh -c "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import I, Rational, expand_func, log, pi, polylog, symbols
z = symbols('z')
assert polylog(2, Rational(1, 2)) == -log(2)**2/2 + pi**2/12
